sourceMovie.title: Triangle of Sadness
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Triangle of Sadness (2022) stuck because it commits to its comedy premise without apologizing—viewers remember set pieces and momentum as much as plot. Ruben Östlund's control of tone keeps the ride coherent. The comedy and drama blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: The Lobster
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Triangle of Sadness clicked for you, The Lobster (2015) is a strong next stop: both trade in comedy and drama, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Triangle of Sadness?
faq.answer: Try The Lobster, Demolition, A Lot Like Love—each shares DNA with Triangle of Sadness while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Triangle of Sadness?
faq.answer: Triangle of Sadness (2022) is best described as Comedy, Drama. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Triangle of Sadness worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 7.0/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this comedy lane.
